parameters.name: __count
parameters.description: The total count of items in the feed.

parameters.name: __next
parameters.description: The link for the next page of items in the feed.

parameters.name: Data
parameters.description: The collection of entities for this feed.

children.name: LanguageCode
children.description: The ISO 639-1 two-letter language code. (Except for zh-cn and zh-tw). This list only includes languages for which Saxo has full or partial support for translation of texts.

children.name: LanguageName
children.description: The name of the language (in English).

children.name: NativeName
children.description: The name of the language (in native language).

parameters.name: MaxRows
parameters.description: The maximum number of rows that can be returned (if applicable).
